name: Client Operating Model Phase 11 Operator Surfaces
outcome_goal: Produce the operator inspection, Canvas surfaces, and workflow builder UX implementation packet.
anti_requirements: Do not make UI a second authority.
Do not expose green states without receipts, verifiers, or drift evidence.

jobs.label: phase_11_operator_surfaces_packet
jobs.prompt: Write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_11_operator_surfaces/PLAN.md. Produce a bounded build packet for Phase 11: Operator Inspection, Canvas Surfaces, and Workflow Builder UX. Cover system census views, object truth inspection, identity/source authority views, simulation timeline, verifier results, sandbox drift, cartridge status, next safe actions, API/MCP surfaces, tests, and validation. Do not edit code.
